title: FMAS: Fast Multi-Objective SuperNet Architecture Search for Semantic Segmentation

key_techniques: Evaluating candidates on a subset of validation set

computational_efficiency.accuracy_impact: Less than 3% increase in MIoU error

key_contributions: Proposal of FMAS for fast multi-objective NAS in semantic segmentation
Use of DeepLabV3+ as supernet for searching computationally-efficient models
Demonstration of deployment on ultra-low-power GAP8 platform
